mdx.rawBody:
---
status: public
shortDescription: "Assignment copies the object"
shortCorrection: "Assignment copies the reference pointing to the object"
concepts:
  - Assignment
  - Variable
  - Object
  - Reference
related:
  - id: EqualityOperatorComparesObjectsValues
    relation: Parallel (also about reference vs. value)
  - id: ObjectAsParameterIsCopied
    relation: Parallel (also about reference vs. value)
inOtherPl:
  - pl: Java
    id: AssignmentCopiesObject
spec:
  - id: ecma11
    sections: ["12.15.4"]
plVersion:
  # from: ecma6
  #  to: ecma11
---

An expression like `newObj = obj` creates a copy of the object `obj`
and assigns that copy to the variable `newObj`.

frontmatter.shortCorrection: Assignment copies the reference pointing to the object
